text.title: ClickUp Setup Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of ClickUp Setup.

example.scenario: 5-person team adopting ClickUp. 3 Spaces (eng / ops / sales), 7 canonical statuses, 7 automations across Spaces, 4 ClickApps on (TT/CF/Dep/Sprints), ≤5 views per List. Policy committed to /docs/clickup-policy.md.
